nasb.text: Hezekiah was the father of Manasseh, Manasseh the father of Amon, and Amon the father of Josiah.

esv.text: and Hezekiah the father of Manasseh, and Manasseh the father of Amos, and Amos the father of Josiah,

cnv.text: 希西家生瑪拿西，瑪拿西生亞們，亞們生約西亞，

ccb.text: 希西迦生玛拿西， 玛拿西生亚们， 亚们生约西亚，

csbs.text: 希西家生玛拿西， 玛拿西生阿蒙， 阿蒙生约西亚，
